---
title: "'Neither agree, nor disagree': A critical analysis of the middle answer category in Voting Advice Applications"
author: "Baka, A., Figgou, L., and Triga, V."
date: 2012-01-01
description: "International Journal of Electronic Governance, 5, 244–263"
doi: "10.1504/IJEG.2012.051306"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---

**Link:** [https://doi.org/10.1504/IJEG.2012.051306](https://doi.org/10.1504/IJEG.2012.051306)
